pageTitle: Are there any reasons that this application should not be shared with the other parties?
caption: Make an application
heading: Are there any reasons that this application should not be shared with the other parties?
mainQuestion: Are there any reasons that this application should not be shared with the other parties?
reasonForNotSharingQuestion: Provide a reason this application should not be shared with the other party
weUsuallySendACopyOfYourApplication: We usually send a copy of your application to the other parties (your landlord, housing association or mortgage lender). This gives them the opportunity to respond to it.
inSomeExceptionalCircumstances: In some exceptional circumstances, the judge will consider your application without telling the other party first.
itIsUrgent: it is so urgent that there is not enough time to give notice
couldUndermineTheOrder: giving someone notice could undermine the order you want the court to grant.
youBelieveYouAreAtRisk: you believe you are at risk from the other party
weWillAskYouToProvideTheReason: We will ask you to provide the reason. The court will consider your reason, and you may not be successful.

errors.confirmIfThereIsAReason: Confirm whether there is a reason why this application should not be shared with the other parties
errors.provideAReason: Confirm why the other parties should not be informed
